articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Danger-level heat indices are forecast in 15 areas across the country on Tuesday, May 5, the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) said. Danger-level heat indices range from 42oC to 51oC and carry increased risks of heat cramps and heat exhaustion, which may lead to heat stroke, according to Pagasa.

articles.description: International Energy Agency analysis shows methane leaks remained at near-record highs in 2025 Methane emissions from the energy sector remained at near record levels in 2025, the International Energy Agency concluded in a report. Tackling the emissions could make billions of cubic metres of gas available to international markets, a top priority as the war in the Middle East squeezes energy supplies , according to the report. articles.title: Damage reported across Eastern Visayas after magnitude 6.0 quake
articles.description: TACLOBAN CITY — Damage was reported in several parts of Eastern Visayas after a magnitude 6.0 earthquake struck off San Julian, Eastern Samar, on Monday. The Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology has downgraded the magnitude of the quake from 6.1 to 6.0. READ: Eastern Samar suspends work, classes after magnitude 6.1 quake In San Julian, the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office immediately conducted rapid assessments near the epicenter to determine possible structural damage. In Maydolong, the municipal government temporarily suspended water supply after a drop in water pressure triggered by the tremor. Technical personnel are currently inspecting [...]... articles.description: SM Development Corporation (SMDC) has opened its SMDC Nature Visayas Hub in Iloilo City, marking a significant step in the company’s continued expansion beyond Metro Manila and its commitment to serve more homebuyers in key regional centers. articles.title: Evolution isn’t random. Scientists find the same genes used for 120 million years
articles.description: Evolution seems to follow a script more often than expected. Researchers found that distantly related butterflies and moths have reused the same pair of genes for over 120 million years to produce strikingly similar warning colors. Rather than altering the genes themselves, evolution modifies how they’re switched on and off. This discovery hints that life may evolve in more predictable ways than previously believed.

articles.title: Lightning sparks fire, razes 4 homes in Bukidnon
articles.description: MARAMAG, Bukidnon — Three houses were destroyed, and another was damaged after a fire, believed to have been triggered by a lightning strike, broke out during a rainy, gusty Sunday afternoon in this town. Fire Officer Rommel Macabasag of the Bureau of Fire Protection (BFP) said witnesses reported hearing a loud burst before the blaze

articles.title: Horoscope for Monday, May 04, 2026
articles.description:
Moon alert

Avoid shopping (except food and gas) and important decisions after 4 p.m. Chicago time. The moon is in Sagittarius.

Aries (March 21-April 19)

A positive day

Today you're bursting with energy to get things done because you're enthusiastic, proactive and ambitious. (Oh yeah.) You might make travel plans. You might also explore opportunities in medicine, the law and higher education. Note: Don't bite off more than you can chew.

Taurus (April 20-May 20)

An average day

You're chatty today because Mercury is in your sign, making you eager to share your ideas with others. Furthermore, with the sun also in your sign, you're more confident and enthusiastic! Today you can make headway with behind-the-scenes financial red-tape matters.

Gemini (May 21-June 20)

A positive day

This is a marvelous day to enjoy the company of friends. In particular, you'll be successful dealing with groups and organizations because your enthusiasm and drive will catch their attention. You might even take control. (However, you'll be tactful and charming because Venus is in your sign.)

Cancer (June 21-July 22)

An average day

Your ambition is aroused today, and you intend to go after what you want. People will step aside, as they do for anyone who knows where they’re going. This is a popular time for you. Many of you are talking to younger people more than usual.

Leo (July 23-Aug. 22)

A positive day

This is a powerful way to begin your week. The sun at the top of your chart makes you look fabulous in everyone's eyes. Meanwhile, you're gung-ho to travel and explore opportunities in medicine, the law and higher education. Go, go, go!

Virgo (Aug. 23-Sept. 22)

An average day

This is a strong day for you! Check out travel plans or act on your desire to expand your world in some way. Meanwhile, today is an excellent day to defend your best interests in discussions about estates, wills, inheritances, shared property, taxes and debt because you have the advantage.

Libra (Sept. 23-Oct. 22)

An average day

This is a tricky day because you might attract someone who is very forceful. Meanwhile, you're a people pleaser. (Deal with this combination as best you can, and don't give away the farm.) Explore opportunities to travel and do something different.

Scorpio (Oct. 23-Nov. 21)

An average day

Today, you begin your week hitting the pavement running. You're gung-ho to get a lot done, which is why not only are you working hard, you're also delegating and allocating as much as possible. "Move that mountain!" "Build that bridge!" (Financial arrangements favor you today.)

Sagittarius (Nov. 22-Dec. 21)

A positive day

Today the moon is in your sign, energized by fiery Mars, making this a wonderful day to socialize. It's also a strong day to work in the entertainment world, the hospitality industry and sports. Decisions about how to share something will be in your favor. (Yay!)

Capricorn (Dec. 22-Jan. 19)

An average day

Although you're keen to play and pursue pleasure this week, including romance, today you're motivated to make some domestic improvements. You might explore redecorating projects or renovations. You might even research a residential change.

Aquarius (Jan. 20-Feb. 18)

A positive day

Put on your dancing shoes and get out there because your ability to persuade and convince anyone about anything you want is fabulous today. (In fact, you might come on a bit too strong.) This is a productive day for those in sales, marketing, teaching, acting and writing. It’s also a playful day!

Pisces (Feb. 19-March 20)

An average day

You're very enthusiastic about financial matters today or something to do with earnings and cash flow. People notice you (be aware of this). You might make a bid for a raise or act on some moneymaking ideas. You'll enjoy entertaining at home.

If today is your birthday

Actress Audrey Hepburn (1929-1993) shares your birthday. You are sensible, imaginative, kind and generous. You have a genuine concern for the well-being of others. This is a year of new beginnings, adventures and major changes. Keep your eyes open for new opportunities. Prepare for leadership. What you do now will bring great benefit in the future.
